title: Those Who Dig Pits for Others Will Fall In Themselves
overview: Louis Hartmann joins forces with the members of the Arne Detective Agency to investigate his father's murder.

title: There Is Always Sunshine After the Rain
overview: Lynn remembers the time she first met Arne and hired him to help investigate her father's suspicious behavior.

title: Misfortune Never Visits Alone
overview: Arne makes a shocking discovery about Lynn's father and Gordon reveals the dark truth of the Reinweiß mansion.

title: Those Who Never Gamble Never Win
overview: Lynn and Arne are both troubled by surprise encounters that threaten to alter the course of the investigation.

title: One Swallow Does Not a Summer Make!
overview: Lynn and Arne assemble the servants to review the clues and sniff out the killers through deductive reasoning.

title: Time Will Tell
overview: A distraught mermaid arrives at the detective agency searching for the reason why her lover tried to kill her.

title: Eating Whets the Appetite
overview: Arne tracks down a jewel thief while Lynn investigates a series of disappearances connected to an art museum.

title: Desire and Love Make All Burdens Lighter
overview: Lynn and Arne trace the mysteries of the missing men and lost piece of jewelry to their shocking conclusions.

title: Not All That Glitters Is Gold
overview: Arne and Lynn are asked to investigate a man who appears to have started cheating on his wife after an injury.

title: Different Countries, Different Customs
overview: Arne decides to investigate a locked-room murder on a whim and soon realizes that it may not be what it seems.

title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together
overview: Arne uncovers a disturbing connection between all five of the cases investigated by the Arne Detective Agency.

title: All's Well That Ends Well
overview: Lynn and friends battle their way through Dracula's soldiers as they race to rescue Arne before it's too late.
